title: Korean Editorial Chair Pose Fashion Portrait AI
sourceTitle: Korean Editorial Chair Pose Fashion Portrait AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Subject: adult East Asian fashion model in ivory knit cardigan and long satin skirt, calm emotional gaze appears as an elegant adult fashion model with healthy natural proportions, refined Korean editorial presence, realistic skin texture, calm emotional gaze, and polished styling. Scene: minimal Seoul studio apartment, soft daylight, vertical 2:3 fashion editorial portrait provides the minimal editorial environment while keeping the chair, body angle, and leg relationship readable as the central pose structure. Composition: Fixed single-image 2:3 composition: one knee placed on the chair cushion, the other leg extending diagonally downward with a slim heel touching the floor, body at a half-back 45-degree angle, waist turning naturally, shoulders gently rotating, and head turned back toward camera. Signature Elements: One-knee-on-chair pose, half-back turn, extended diagonal leg, slim high heel touching the floor, calm gaze back to camera, polished Korean editorial mood, and single-frame composition. Style: High-quality realistic Korean fashion editorial photography with refined feminine maturity, soft skin texture, natural hair volume, tasteful styling, and magazine-grade polish. Color Palette: Soft neutral Korean editorial palette with ivory, cream, charcoal, satin highlights, warm interior tones, gentle skin color, and restrained fashion contrast. Lighting: Soft daylight or diffused studio window light, delicate face and fabric highlights, gentle chair shadows, and realistic depth without heavy glamour retouching. Camera: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Materials: Knit, satin, wool, blazer fabric, slim heel leather, chair cushion texture, soft interior surfaces, and natural hair volume rendered with tactile realism. Restrictions: Create one single image only.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
